author: doll-agent
content:
Done. ToArrow and ToPolars (plus bool variants) were impl'd only for Array1<T>. Multi-dim ferray arrays couldn't be sent to Arrow or Polars without an explicit flatten step.

Generalized to any Array<T, D>: both Arrow and Polars Series are inherently 1-D, so multi-dim inputs flatten via to_vec_flat() in row-major (C) order. Reverse path stays Array1; callers reshape after into_ferray.

6 tests covering Array2 and ArrayD (3-D) flattening for Arrow and Polars + boolean variants.

ferray-numpy-interop: 71 -> 77 tests, all passing, clippy clean. Commit db3a5f14.
